title: Historical Data Snapshot
description: All data available for a station at a given historical moment. Answers: 'What would an AI agent have known at time T?' DST-aware Kalshi settlement window logic (midnight-midnight LST, NWS CLI published ~10 AM ET next day).

station.description: Station code (3-4 letter NWS code, e.g. NYC, ATL, KORD).

as_of.description: Query timestamp (UTC ISO 8601). Data after this point is excluded.

settlement_date.description: Kalshi settlement date (YYYY-MM-DD in LOCAL STANDARD TIME). The date whose midnight-to-midnight LST window contains as_of.

window_start_utc.description: UTC start of the settlement window (midnight LST = midnight_LST + abs(standard_offset)).

window_end_utc.description: UTC end of the settlement window (24 hours after window_start_utc).

observations.description: METAR/SPECI observations within the settlement window and before as_of. Raw storage schema (30 fields).

climate.description: NWS CLI climate record for settlement_date, if published before as_of. Null if not yet available (CLI typically issued ~10 AM ET next day).

cli_publication_delay_hours.description: Hours after midnight LST when the NWS CLI report is assumed to be published. Default 10.0 (10 AM ET next day per Kalshi contract spec).

forecasts.description: Forecasts available at as_of (most-recent model run before as_of). Null until sprint2/forecast-backfill is merged.

data_version.description: Watermark/version tag for reproducibility. ISO timestamp of the most-recent observation in this snapshot, or 'empty' if no observations.

$comment: BUSINESS RULES: (1) Settlement window is midnight-midnight LOCAL STANDARD TIME (LST). During US DST, the clock-time window is 1:00 AM to 1:00 AM next day, but the LST window is always aligned to UTC-offset for standard time. (2) Climate record included only if as_of >= window_start_utc + 24h + cli_publication_delay_hours (i.e., the report would have been published). (3) Observations include only rows where observed_at <= as_of. (4) data_version is the latest observed_at in the observations list, enabling exact replay of AI agent training data. (5) LST offset computed from the station's IANA timezone using a January reference date (no DST in January for US stations).
